theme: hospital roster that a dumb dispatcher must repair
title: Standby by Design: Rostering for a Dumb Dispatcher
strategies: trivial: canonical roster -- fill each shift with the lowest-index qualified nurse (concentrates load on the low-index specialists)
greedy: even workload balancing -- assign each shift to the qualified nurse with the fewest shifts so far; ignores scenarios and the repair rule

strong: co-optimize with the frozen greedy dispatcher -- evaluate the true worst-scenario cost via the published repair simulation and local-search the roster so scarce-skill reserves stay free exactly where the low-index scan will reach them
reserve-the-specialist heuristic: keep scarce-skill nurses off common shifts so a standby specialist survives most callouts (partial insight)
